corrections.note: Running head shows Roman 'I' (chapter) and Arabic '8' as separate tokens, not merged '18'.
Σειὼν carries a grave accent on the ω in the printed text.
Σειὼν carries a grave accent on the ω in the printed text.
No prime/apex follows ℵ in the image — the '΄' is spurious.
Printed form inside parens is εξηρθ. (with θ), not εξηρ.

corrections.location: v. 6, between 'ως] incep ο ℵ*' and 'νομην]+'
corrections.note: Missing closing bracket ']' and missing η on the variant μη.
Qmg variant reads ζη (transliteration form), not the Greek particle ἢ.

uncertain.note: Accent position (Οὐάυ vs Οὐαύ) in the image is hard to resolve at this resolution.
Accent position (Ζαίν vs Ζάιν) in the image is hard to resolve at this resolution.
The word after σ΄ may not be στιχους — printed form looks like it could be σιγχος/συγχ..., not clearly resolvable.

uncertain.location: apparatus v. 6, 'ℵᶜb' and 'ℵᶜ*' in '(uncis incl ℵᶜ*)'
uncertain.note: Image appears to show ℵᶜ·ᵇ and ℵᶜ·ᵃ with dot+superscript letter; transcription renders them as ℵᶜb and ℵᶜ* respectively.

notes: Gathering signature 'B' at upper right margin is not captured in the transcription (minor).
